title: American Big Food
description: Unifying a global food and nutrition brand's marketing ecosystem across 15+ business units — 30+ design components, 100+ campaigns, 1,000+ placements.

card.blurb: Consolidated a sprawling 6,500-page ecosystem into a streamlined sub-1,000-page platform with a complete UX/UI redesign — now live.

lede: A global food and nutrition brand connecting supply chains, products and markets across six continents — operating at massive scale, with a worldwide workforce and an expansive business ecosystem.

feature.caption: From the source through the supply chain — a brand operating across six continents.

pillarsHeading: One system. Fifteen business units. Six continents.

pillars.title: Unified ecosystem
pillars.body: We brought fragmented campaigns, technology and teams across 15+ business units under one smart, scalable system.

pillars.title: Experience by design
pillars.body: We mapped customer journeys and built 30+ design components — a kit of parts the global team could trust.

pillars.title: Localize & scale
pillars.body: We created tools that let regional teams localize and scale content effortlessly across markets without losing the system.

storyParagraphs: The brand's marketing footprint was vast — and fragmented. Disconnected campaigns, parallel tech stacks, and teams working in silos across 15+ business units. Our job was to unify it: one system, one design language, one way to ship work that still flexed to local markets.

From 100+ campaigns across 1,000+ placements, we helped shift the organization away from heavy paid-media dependence and toward a more connected, full-funnel marketing ecosystem — built to drive engagement and conversion at every stage of the customer journey.
storyImageAlt: Global food and nutrition brand — at the source
storyCaption: A unified system spanning 15+ business units and 1,000+ placements.

highlights.title: 15+ business units unified
highlights.body: One scalable system across a global operating ecosystem.

highlights.title: 30+ design components
highlights.body: A shared kit of parts mapped to real customer journeys.

highlights.title: Localization tools at scale
highlights.body: Regional teams ship content effortlessly across markets.

highlights.title: 100+ campaigns · 1,000+ placements
highlights.body: A shift from paid-media dependence to full-funnel marketing.

ctaHeading: Need a global system that scales without losing the brand?
